rules_text:
Mind 1 [i](You must spend at least 1 mind mana to play this card.)[/i]
{2}, Exert: Attack 2. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each card you’ve drawn this turn other than the first two. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose 2 health. If they chose a card they control, remove 2 endurance counter from it.)[/i]
